info.name: Tangacare Chat & Notifications API
info.description:
# Tangacare Real-Time Chat & Notifications API

Complete API documentation for the real-time chat and notification system.

## Overview

This collection provides comprehensive documentation for:
- **Real-time messaging** between doctors and patients
- **Conversation management** with privacy controls
- **Read/unread tracking** with per-user read receipts
- **Notifications** with offline persistence
- **Online status** tracking for active users

## Authentication

All endpoints require JWT authentication. Include the access token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your_access_token>
```

## Base URL
- **Development**: `http://localhost:3000`
- **Production**: `https://api.tangacare.com`

## Socket.IO Real-Time Events

For real-time features, connect to Socket.IO with authentication:
```javascript
const socket = io('http://localhost:3000', {
  auth: { token: 'your_jwt_token' }
});
```

## Key Features

✅ Private doctor-patient messaging
✅ Real-time message delivery via Socket.IO
✅ Read receipts and typing indicators
✅ Unread message counts
✅ Online/offline status tracking
✅ Persistent notifications for offline users
✅ Message history with pagination
✅ Full privacy and access controls

item.name: Chat - Conversations
item.description: Manage chat conversations between doctors and patients. Each conversation is private and unique to a doctor-patient pair.

request.description:
# Create a New Conversation

Creates a new chat conversation between a patient and a doctor. If a conversation already exists between the same patient and doctor, it returns the existing conversation.

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| doctorId | integer | Yes | The ID of the doctor to start a conversation with |

## Response

**Success (201 Created)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "patient_id": 5,
    "doctor_id": 1,
    "last_message": null,
    "last_message_at": null,
    "created_at": "2026-01-13T20:30:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-01-13T20:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

## Authorization

- **Patient**: Can create conversations with any doctor
- **Doctor**: Cannot create conversations (patients initiate)

## Notes

- Conversations are unique per doctor-patient pair
- If a conversation already exists, it returns the existing one
- The conversation ID is used for all subsequent messaging

# Get All Conversations

Retrieves all conversations for the authenticated user (patient or doctor). Includes unread message counts and online status of the other participant.

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "patient_id": 5,
      "doctor_id": 1,
      "last_message": "Hello doctor, I need help",
      "last_message_at": "2026-01-13T20:35:00Z",
      "created_at": "2026-01-13T20:30:00Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-01-13T20:35:00Z",
      "unread_count": 2,
      "other_user": {
        "id": 3,
        "first_name": "Dr. John",
        "last_name": "Smith",
        "profile_picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
        "is_online": true,
        "last_seen": "2026-01-13T20:40:00Z"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

## Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | integer | Conversation ID |
| patient_id | integer | Patient user ID |
| doctor_id | integer | Doctor ID |
| last_message | string | Text of the last message |
| last_message_at | datetime | Timestamp of last message |
| unread_count | integer | Number of unread messages for current user |
| other_user | object | Details of the other participant |
| other_user.is_online | boolean | Whether the other user is currently online |
| other_user.last_seen | datetime | Last time the user was online |

## Sorting

- Conversations are sorted by `last_message_at` (most recent first)
- Conversations with no messages appear at the bottom

# Get Conversation Details

Retrieves details of a specific conversation including participant information.

## URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | integer | Conversation ID |

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "patient_id": 5,
    "doctor_id": 1,
    "last_message": "Thank you doctor",
    "last_message_at": "2026-01-13T20:45:00Z",
    "created_at": "2026-01-13T20:30:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-01-13T20:45:00Z",
    "patient": {
      "id": 5,
      "first_name": "Jane",
      "last_name": "Doe",
      "phone_number": "+250788123456"
    },
    "doctor": {
      "id": 1,
      "user_id": 3,
      "specialization": "Cardiology",
      "license_number": "RMDC-001/2026"
    }
  }
}
```

## Privacy

- Users can only access conversations they are part of
- Returns 401 Unauthorized if user is not a participant

item.name: Chat - Messages
item.description: Send and retrieve messages within conversations. Supports text, images, and file attachments.

request.description:
# Get Conversation Messages

Retrieves paginated messages from a conversation. Messages are returned in chronological order (oldest first).

## URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | integer | Conversation ID |

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | integer | 1 | Page number for pagination |
| limit | integer | 50 | Number of messages per page (max: 100) |

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "conversation_id": 1,
        "sender_id": 5,
        "sender_type": "patient",
        "content": "Hello doctor, I have chest pain",
        "message_type": "text",
        "file_url": null,
        "created_at": "2026-01-13T20:35:00Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-01-13T20:35:00Z",
        "sender": {
          "id": 5,
          "first_name": "Jane",
          "last_name": "Doe"
        },
        "reads": [
          {
            "user_id": 3,
            "read_at": "2026-01-13T20:36:00Z"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "total": 25,
    "page": 1,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

## Message Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| text | Plain text message |
| image | Image attachment (file_url contains image URL) |
| file | File attachment (file_url contains file URL) |

## Sender Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| patient | Message sent by patient |
| doctor | Message sent by doctor |

## Pagination

- Use `page` and `limit` to paginate through messages
- `totalPages` indicates total number of pages
- Load older messages by incrementing `page`

# Send a Message

Sends a new message in a conversation. The message is also broadcast in real-time via Socket.IO to connected users.

## URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | integer | Conversation ID |

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| content | string | Yes | Message text content |
| message_type | string | No | Type: 'text', 'image', 'file' (default: 'text') |
| file_url | string | No | URL of uploaded file/image (required for image/file types) |

## Response

**Success (201 Created)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 15,
    "conversation_id": 1,
    "sender_id": 5,
    "sender_type": "patient",
    "content": "I have been experiencing chest pain",
    "message_type": "text",
    "file_url": null,
    "created_at": "2026-01-13T20:50:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-01-13T20:50:00Z"
  }
}
```

## Real-Time Behavior

1. Message is saved to database
2. Message is emitted via Socket.IO to conversation participants
3. If recipient is not in the conversation room, a notification is created
4. Recipient's unread count is updated in real-time

## Example: Send Image

```json
{
  "content": "Here is my X-ray",
  "message_type": "image",
  "file_url": "https://storage.tangacare.com/images/xray-123.jpg"
}
```

## Notes

- Sender type is automatically determined from user role
- Conversation's `last_message` and `last_message_at` are updated
- Maximum content length: 5000 characters

# Mark All Messages as Read

Marks all unread messages in a conversation as read for the current user. This updates the read status and triggers real-time read receipts.

## URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | integer | Conversation ID |

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Conversation marked as read"
}
```

## Real-Time Behavior

1. All unread messages are marked as read in database
2. `message_read` events are emitted via Socket.IO to message senders
3. User's unread count is updated to 0 for this conversation
4. Unread count update is broadcast to all user's connected devices

## Notes

- Only marks messages sent by the other user (not your own messages)
- Creates `message_read` records with current timestamp
- Idempotent - safe to call multiple times
- Does not mark messages as read if already read

item.name: Chat - Unread Counts
item.description: Track unread message counts across all conversations.

request.description: Get call history for the authenticated user.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Manage user notifications. Notifications are created automatically for various events and persist for offline users.

request.description:
# Get User Notifications

Retrieves paginated notifications for the authenticated user. Notifications are sorted by creation date (newest first).

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | integer | 1 | Page number for pagination |
| limit | integer | 20 | Number of notifications per page |

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "notifications": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "user_id": 5,
        "type": "new_message",
        "title": "New Message",
        "message": "Dr. John Smith: I can help you with that...",
        "data": {
          "conversationId": 1,
          "messageId": 15
        },
        "is_read": false,
        "read_at": null,
        "created_at": "2026-01-13T20:50:00Z"
      },
      {
        "id": 2,
        "user_id": 5,
        "type": "appointment_reminder",
        "title": "Appointment Reminder",
        "message": "Your appointment with Dr. Smith is in 1 hour",
        "data": {
          "appointmentId": 10
        },
        "is_read": true,
        "read_at": "2026-01-13T19:30:00Z",
        "created_at": "2026-01-13T19:00:00Z"
      }
    ],
    "total": 15,
    "page": 1,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

## Notification Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| new_message | New chat message received |
| appointment_reminder | Upcoming appointment reminder |
| appointment_confirmed | Appointment has been confirmed |
| appointment_cancelled | Appointment has been cancelled |
| prescription_ready | Prescription is ready |
| payment_received | Payment has been processed |
| health_tip | New health tip available |

## Data Field

The `data` field contains type-specific metadata:

**new_message**:
```json
{
  "conversationId": 1,
  "messageId": 15
}
```

**appointment_reminder**:
```json
{
  "appointmentId": 10,
  "appointmentDate": "2026-01-13T21:00:00Z"
}
```

# Mark Notification as Read

Marks a specific notification as read for the current user.

## URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | integer | Notification ID |

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Notification marked as read"
}
```

## Behavior

- Sets `is_read` to `true`
- Sets `read_at` to current timestamp
- Idempotent - safe to call multiple times
- Returns error if notification doesn't belong to user

## Privacy

Users can only mark their own notifications as read.

# Mark All Notifications as Read

Marks all unread notifications as read for the current user.

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "All notifications marked as read"
}
```

## Behavior

- Updates all notifications where `is_read = false`
- Sets `is_read` to `true` and `read_at` to current timestamp
- Only affects notifications belonging to the current user
- Efficient bulk update operation

## Use Cases

- "Mark all as read" button in notification center
- Clear all notification badges
- Bulk notification management

# Delete Notification

Permanently deletes a notification for the current user.

## URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | integer | Notification ID |

## Response

**Success (200 OK)**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Notification deleted"
}
```

## Behavior

- Permanently removes notification from database
- Cannot be undone
- Returns error if notification doesn't belong to user

## Privacy

Users can only delete their own notifications.

## Use Cases

- Dismiss individual notifications
- Clean up notification history
- Remove irrelevant notifications

item.name: Socket.IO Events
item.description: Real-time events via Socket.IO for instant messaging, typing indicators, read receipts, and online status.
